description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in smooth white plaster, accented by sections of dark stone cladding and wooden paneling near the main entrance. The front features a covered porch with a flat roof supported by columns, and a set of wide steps leading up to a wooden door. Large vertical windows are symmetrically arranged on the sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house sits on a rectangular grassy plot with a concrete base, and the rear includes a sheltered area that could serve as a patio or carport. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a gray gable roof, white plaster walls, stone accents, and large vertical windows. The front features a covered porch with steps and a wooden door.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a covered porch, wide steps, and a wooden door, as well as stone and wood accents.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the house with the covered porch roof and the grassy yard, showing less detail of the main entrance.
description_view_2: The rear view displays large vertical windows and the geometric lines of the gable roof, with minimal entry features visible.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the secondary entrance area, additional stone cladding, and the transition between the porch and the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with a flat roof, wide steps, a wooden door, and stone and wood accents.
